meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no project ideas. Learn how to build high-converting user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code to impress your clients.
content.answer_block: The 'no project idea' block is a failure of scope, not creativity. Solve it by building modular, high-impact user onboarding components. By mastering onboarding, you provide immediate, measurable ROI for clients, turning a simple task into a recurring service offering that builds your portfolio and authority in the AI space.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the freelancer’s greatest enemy. You have the technical skills, but the lack of a 'big idea' keeps you spinning your wheels while your bank account sits stagnant. The reality is that clients don't need another revolutionary app; they need the friction removed from their existing ones. 

User onboarding is the high-leverage 'surgical strike' of web development. It is the bridge between a bounced visitor and a loyal customer. By specializing in onboarding, you stop hunting for projects and start solving the most expensive problem every SaaS founder has: user churn. Let’s turn that lack of ideas into a repeatable, profitable productized service.

steps.title: Define the Onboarding Archetype
steps.description: Identify the core friction point. Are you building a product tour, a feature highlight, or a data-gathering flow? Focus on a single 'Aha!' moment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a high-conversion user onboarding schema for a SaaS platform. Include steps for welcome, value-prop highlight, and a single primary CTA. Use a clean, modern UI structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a React onboarding modal component with framer-motion animations'

steps.title: Architect the State Machine
steps.description: Onboarding is a state machine, not just a series of modals. Track user progress to ensure they don't get stuck.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust state management logic for a 3-step onboarding flow. Ensure it tracks progress in localStorage and allows users to skip.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement a custom hook for onboarding step state management'

steps.title: Inject Contextual AI Guidance
steps.description: Use AI to personalize the onboarding experience based on user input, making the app feel 'alive' and responsive.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a prompt template that takes user industry input and dynamically updates onboarding tooltip text.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Integrate an AI-driven text generator for personalized onboarding tooltips'

steps.title: Build the Feedback Loop
steps.description: Add analytics tracking to your onboarding steps so you can report conversion improvements back to your client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a lightweight tracking utility that fires events for each onboarding step completion to a mock analytics endpoint.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Add telemetry tracking for onboarding component engagement'

steps.title: Package for Rapid Deployment
steps.description: Turn your onboarding flow into a reusable library component so you can drop it into any client project in minutes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the onboarding flow into a standalone, themeable NPM package structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Package the onboarding component for export to a private component library'

pro_tips: Always A/B test the first step of your onboarding; it's where 80% of your drop-offs occur.
Use 'opt-out' rather than 'skip' buttons; phrasing changes psychology and increases completion rates.
Embed your onboarding logic in a separate repository so you can offer it as a standalone 'Onboarding-as-a-Service' product.
Never ask for more than one piece of information per screen; cognitive load is the enemy of conversion.
Use progress bars that are slightly filled from the start; the 'Endowed Progress Effect' motivates users to finish.
content.next_steps: Take the onboarding component you just built, wrap it in a case study for your portfolio, and pitch it to three local SaaS founders as a 'Conversion Audit & Upgrade' package.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn a simple onboarding flow into a high-value freelance asset. Don't wait for the next 'big idea'—solve the problems that are already right in front of you. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
